scripts.build: npm run build -w @scheduler/shared && npm run build -w @scheduler/worker && npm run build -w @scheduler/api && npm run build -w @scheduler/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @scheduler/shared && npm run test -w @scheduler/worker && npm run test -w @scheduler/api
scripts.test:int: npm run test:int -w @scheduler/shared && npm run test:int -w @scheduler/worker && npm run test:int -w @scheduler/api
